title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v NDAYIZEYE
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v NDAYIZEYE
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 01404/2024/CA (Kaliwabo, P.J.) 29 Mutarama
2026]
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Ibimenyetso mu manza nshinjabyaha –Ibimenyetso bishingiye
ku buhamya – Nubwo bitabujijwe ko ushinjwa atanga ubuhamya ku muntu bashinjwa hamwe,
ubwo buhamya bugomba kuba busobanutse ku buryo burambuye kandi bugashyigikirwa n’ibindi
bimenyetso bifite ireme.
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Ibimenyetso mu manza nshinjabyaha –Ibimenyetso bishingiye
ku buhamya – Byaba ari ukugenekereza mu guhamya umuntu icyaha hashingiwe ku kuba
atarashoboye kugaragaza icyo apfa n’abamushinja icyaha kuko ireme ry’ubuhamya rigomba
kugaragarira mu buryo ibivugwa bihuje n’ukuri kw’ibyabaye kandi bikaboneka ko utanga
ubuhamya asobanura neza ibyo yabonye cyangwa yumvise ku buryo butuma umucamanza yemera
nta shiti ko ibivuzwe bigize ikimenyetso gishinja.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uru rubanza rwabayeho nyuma yuko hari uwitwa Nshimiyimana na
Ishimwe bafatanywe buri wese agapfunyika ka heroine, babajijwe aho bayigura basubiza ko
bayigurishwa na Ndayizeye (uregwa muri uru rubanza). Bivugwa ko polisi yifashishije uwitwa
Hagenimana, agahamagara uregwa kugira ngo amuzanire udupfunyika 3 twa heroine. Mu
gukurikirana icyo cyaha abafatanywe iyo heroine bo bemeragara icyaha naho Ndayizeye
akagihakana avuga ko abatangabuhamya bamubeshyera, ko yahamagawe n’uwitwa Hagenimana
amuzaniye telefoni yo kugura kandi ko nta biyobyabwenge nsdetse n’inshinge yigeze afatanwa.
Ku rwego rubanza, Urukiko rwahamije Ndayizeye icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bwa heroine, rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu no gutanga ihazabu y’amafaranga
20.000.000, naho abandi bahamwa n’icyaha cyo kunywa ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye, bo
rubahanisha buri wese igifungo cy’umwaka.
Ndayizeye yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru anenga ko Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwamuhamije icyaha cyo
kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge bya Heroine hagendewe ku mvugo z’ibinyoma za Nshimiyimana na
Ishimwe, ko yari asanzwe asangira nabo “heroine” nyamara we akaza kubireka, ko n’imvugo
ya’uwitwa Hagenimana yashingiweho ari ikinyoma kigamije kumwihimuraho kubera ko yigeze
kumushinja ubujura. Urwo Rukiko narwo rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ubujurire bwe budafite
ishingiro hashingiwe ku kuba nta ibimenyetso atanga bitavuguruza ibyashingiweho ahamwa n’
icyaha kuko heroine yayifatanywe ndetse abayiguraga iwe baramushinja, ko kuba avuga ko hari
ibyo bapfa nta shingiro byahabwa kuko nta bimenyetso abitangira. Icyakora, hashingiwe ku zindi
mpamvu yagabanyirijwe igihano ahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga 5.000.000.
Ndayizeye yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru rwamuhamije icyaha
rushingiye ku buhamya butavugisha ukuri ndetse ko na “pv de constat” ifatwa nk’ikimenyetso
atayemera, ko, iyo Urukiko ruyisesengura neza rwari kubona ko nta kintu yafatanywe, ko
n’inshinge bavuga ko yafatanywe atazi aho abapolisi bazivanye, ariyo mpamvu yanze no gusinya
iyi raporo.

Iyo miburanire ye yatumye Urukiko Rw’Ubujurire rusuzuma ikibazo cyo kumenya niba Urukiko
rwaramuhamije icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge nta bimenyetso bishingiweho
bikimuhamya.
Incamake y’icyemezo: 1. Nubwo bitabujijwe ko ushinjwa atanga ubuhamya ku muntu bashinjwa
hamwe, ubwo buhamya bugomba kuba busobanutse ku buryo burambuye kandi bugashyigikirwa
n’ibindi bimenyetso bifite ireme. Bityo ntibihagije gushingira ku mvugo y’uwitwa Nshimiyimana
na Ishimwe ivuga ko heroine bafatanwe bayiguze na Ndayizeye, kuko nta kindi kimenyetso gihuza
heroine bafatanwe na Ndayizeye bavuga ko yayibahaye.
2. Byaba ari ukugenekereza mu guhamya umuntu icyaha hashingiwe ku kuba atarashoboye
kugaragaza icyo apfa n’abamushinja icyaha kuko ireme ry’ubuhamya rigomba kugaragarira mu
buryo ibivugwa bihuje n’ukuri kw’ibyabaye kandi bikaboneka ko utanga ubuhamya asobanura
neza ibyo yabonye cyangwa yumvise ku buryo butuma umucamanza yemera nta shiti ko ibivuzwe
bigize ikimenyetso gishinja.
Ubujurire bufite ishingiro.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko No 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
z’inshinjabyaha, Ingingo ya 107 n’iya 111.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Dusengimana Ferdinand, RPAA 0001/14/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga
ku wa 17/11/2017.
Inyandiko z’abahanga:
Henry Bosly et Damien Vandermeersch, Droit de la procédure pénale, 4e édition, p. 1316.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 17/10/2020, abitwa Nshimiyimana Isaac na Ishimwe Appolinaire bafatanwe, buri
wese agapfunyika ka heroine, babajijwe aho bayigura basubiza ko bayigurishwa na Ndayizeye
Patrick. Bivugwa ko polisi yifashishije uwitwa Hagenimana Christian, agahamagara Ndayizeye
kugira ngo amuzanire udupfunyika 3 twa heroine, uyu ngo akaba yarayizanye ariko yikanze
abapolisi arayijugunya, afatanwa inshinge 2 zo kwitera ibiyobyabwenge.

[2] Nshimiyimana na Ishimwe bafashwe bemera icyaha cyo kunywa ibiyobyabwenge naho
Ndayizeye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko abatangabuhamya bamubeshyera, ko yahamagawe na
Hagenimana amuzaniye telefoni yo kugura kandi ko nta biyobyabwenge yigeze afatanwa ndetse
ngo n’inshinge zivugwa akaba atari we wazifatanwe, ariyo mpamvu yanze gusinya inyandiko-
mvugo y’ifatira ryazo.
[3] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Nshimiyimana Isaac na Ishimwe
Appolinnaire icyaha cyo kunywa ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bwa heroine, icyaha nabo
bemera, naho Ndayizeye aregwa icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge, aburana ahakana icyaha.
[4] Mu rubanza N° RP 01371/2020/TGI/GSBO rwaciwe ku wa 29/04/2021, Urukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo rwahamije Nshimiyimana Isaac na Ishimwe Appolinaire icyaha cyo
kunywa ibiyobyabwenge bihambaye, ruhanisha buri wese igifungo cy’umwaka 1. Urukiko
rwahamije kandi Ndayizeye Patrick icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bwa
heroine, rumuhanisha igifungo cya burundu no gutanga ihazabu y’amafaranga 20.000.000; iki
cyaha rukaba rwarakimuhamije rushingiye ku buhamya bwa Nshimiyimana na Ishimwe ndetse
n’ubwa Hagenimana, rushingira kandi ku nyandiko-mvugo y’ifatira ry’inshinge zo kwitera
ibiyobyabwenge.
[5] Ndayizeye Patrick yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru anenga ko Urukiko Rwisumbuye
rwamuhamije icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge bya Heroine hagendewe ku mvugo
z’ibinyoma za Nshimiyimana Isaac na Ishimwe Appolinaire, ko yari asanzwe asangira nabo
“heroine” nyamara we akaza kubireka, ko n’imvugo ya Hagenimana yashingiweho ari ikinyoma
kigamije kumwihimuraho kubera ko yigeze kumushinja ubujura, ko kandi nta nshinge yafatanwe
ariyo mpamvu yanze kuzisinyira, asaba kurenganurwa.
[6] Mu rubanza N° RPA 00768/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe kuwa 12/12/2024, Urukiko Rukuru
rwasanze Ndayizeye atashoboye gutanga ibimenyetso bishyigikira imvugo ye yuko afite icyo apfa
n’abatangabuhamya bamushinja ko ari we wabagurishaga heroine, ko kandi nawe yafatanwe
heroine, bityo ko ingingo ye yo guhakana icyaha nta shingiro ifite. Rwasanze kandi, nubwo
impamvu yajuririshije nta shingiro zihawe, nta cyabuza ko agabanyirizwa ibihano hashingiwe ku
kuba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranwe mu butabera ku buryo buzwi, kuba icyaha yakoze kitaragize
ingaruka zikomeye, kandi ingano yafatanywe ya heroine ari nto, bityo ko igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga 5.000.000 aricyo gikwiranye n’uburemere bw’icyaha ashinjwa, ibi bihano
rukaba rwarabishingiye ku ngingo ya 2 (a na d) y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023
rihindura Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.
[7] Ndayizeye Patrick yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, Urubanza ruhabwa n° RPAA
01404/2024/CA, iburanisha ribera mu ruhame kuwa 13/1/2026, Ndayizeye Patrick yunganiwe na
Me Maniraguha Viateur naho Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Dr Bideri Diogène,
Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[8] Mu myanzuro y’Ubujurire, Ndayizeye Patrick, yunganiwe na Me Maniraguha Viateur,
avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru rwamuhamije icyaha rushingiye ku buhamya butavugisha ukuri ndetse
ko na “pv de constat” ifatwa nk’ikimenyetso atayemera.

[9] Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Ndayizeye Patrick nta
shingiro zifite kuko mu kumuhamya icyaha Urukiko rwashingiye ku mvugo y’abamushinja ko
yabagurishije heroine kandi hafashwe n’inshinge bakoreshaga mu kwitera icyo kiyobyabwenge,
akaba nta kimenyetso yatanze kivuguruza ibyatanzwe ari nabyo byashingiweho ahamwa n’icyaha.
[10] Urukiko rurasuzuma niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarahamije Ndayizeye Patrick icyaha nta
bimenytso simusiga bishingiweho n’igihano yahanishwa.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA
Kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarahamije Ndayizeye Patrick icyaha nta
bimenytso simusiga bishingiweho n’igihano yahanishwa
[11] Ndayizeye Patrick yunganiwe na Me Maniraguha Viateur yajuriye anenga Urukiko Rukuru
ko rwamuhamije icyaha rushingiye ku mvugo z’abamushinja ibinyoma kubera ko bari basanzwe
basangira ibiyobyabwenge hanyuma we akaza kubireka, ko imvugo ya Maniraguha Chritian
igamije kumwihimuraho kuko yigeze kumufatisha yibye muri boutique, ko yamuhamagariye
ikibazo cya telefoni bagombaga kugura ariko Ubushinjacyaha bukamushinja ko yari aje kugurisha
“heroine” kandi ntayo bamufatanye. Ndayizeye avuga kandi ko, iyo Urukiko rusesengura neza
“Rapport de constat”, rwari kubona ko nta kintu yafatanwe, ko n’inshinge bavuga ko yafatanwe
atazi aho abapolisi bazivanye, ariyo mpamvu yanze no gusinya iyi raporo, bityo ikaba idashobora
gufatwaho ikimenyetso.
[12] Me Maniraguha Viateur avuga ko Urukiko rwirengagije ihame rivuga ko Ubushinjacyaha
bufite inshingano yo gutanga ibimenyetso simusiga bishinja icyaha (beyond reasonable doubt),
nyamara ngo ibyatanzwe muri uru rubanza bikaba byuzuye ugushidikanya, ariyo mpamvu
ushinjwa agomba kugirwa umwere.
[13] Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Ndayizeye Patrick nta
shingiro zifite kuko Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha rushingiye ku mvugo y’abamushinja ko
yabagurishije Heroine kandi hafashwe n’inshinge bakoreshaga mu kwitera icyo kiyobyabwenge,
akaba nta kimenyetso yatanze kivuguruza ibyatanzwe ari nabyo byashingiweho ahamwa n’icyaha.
Bityo ko ntaho yahera avugako Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha rugenekereje, kuko rwakoze
isesengura ry’ibimenyetso byatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha, rugaragaza neza icyo rwashingiyeho
rumuhamya icyaha. Busaba ko hahamishwaho imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe mu ngingo zarwo
zose.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[14] Ikibazo kiri muri uru rubanza ni ukumenya niba Urukiko rwarahamije Ndayizeye Patrick
icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge nta bimenyetso bishingiweho bikimuhamya.
[15] Ingingo ya 107 y’Itegeko No 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize
y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha, mu gika cyayo cya 1 n’icya 2 igira iti: “Ubushinjacyaha, uwakorewe
icyaha cyangwa se abamufiteho uburenganzira iyo baregeye indishyi z’akababaro cyangwa
biregeye umuburanyi, ni bo bagomba gutanga ibimenyetso byemeza icyaha. Ukurikiranyweho

icyaha afatwa nk’umwere igihe cyose urubanza rutaramwemeza icyaha burundu. Iyo icyaha cye
kitaragaragazwa, ushinjwa ntagomba gutanga ibimenyetso byo kwiregura.
[16] Mu rubanza Nº 0001/14/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 17/11/2017 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Dusengimana Ferdinand, rubishingiye ku nyandiko z’abahanga mu mategeko1,
rwashimangiye ihame ry’uko nta muntu ugomba kwemezwa ko ahamwe n’icyaha atari uko
Ubushinjacyaha bugaragaje ibimenyetso bidatera ugushidikanya uko ari ko kose.2
[17] Inyandiko itanga ikirego ku rwego rwa mbere igaragaza ko Nshimiyimana na Ishimwe ari
bo bafatanwe ikiyobyabwenge cya “heroine”, babajijwe aho bagikura bavuga ko ari Ndayizeye
wabibagurishije. Iyi nyandiko igaragaza kandi ko, Hagenimana ufatwa nk’uwatanze amakuru, ari
we wifashishijwe mu guhamagara Ndayizeye kugira ngo azane ibiyobyabwenge, Ubushinjacyaha
bukavuga ko mu gihe yabonaga abapolisi, ibiyobyabwenge yabijugunye, ku buryo bitigeze
biboneka. Kuri ibi bimenyetso by’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya, Ubushinjacyaha bwatanze
ikimenyetso cya “rapport de contat” ivuga ko Ndayizeye afatanwe inshinge zo kwitera
ibiyobyabwenge ariko uyu akaba yaranze kuyishyiraho umukono avuga ko ntazo yafatanwe.
[18] Ndayizeye yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru avuga ko atemera ubuhamya bwa Nshimiyimana
n’ubwa Ishimwe bashinjwa hamwe kuko nta kigaragaza ko ibiyobyabwenge bafatanwe babiguze
iwe nk’uko babivuga, anenga ko imvugo yabo idafite ikiyishyigikira. Yajuriye kandi anenga ko
Urukiko rwakoze ikosa ryo gushingira ku buhamya bwa Hagenimana uvuga ko yari amuhamagaye
ngo amuzanire ibiyobyabwenge, nyamara ntabyo yafatanwe kandi ko amubeshyera kubwo
kumwihimuraho. Yanenze na rapport de constat kuko ibiyivugwamo atabyemera, ariyo mpamvu
yanze kuyishyiraho umukono kuko inshinge ziyivugwamo atari we wazifatanwe.
[19] Urukiko rurasanga, mu mwanya wo gusuzuma uko Urukiko Rukuru rwasesenguye
ibimenyetso ushinjwa anenga, rwasubije ubujurire bwe mu gika kimwe rukumbi, gihiniye muri
aya magambo “Rusanga ibimenyetso Ndayizeye atanga bitavuguruza ibyashingiweho bamuhamya
icyaha kuko heroine yarayifatanywe ndetse abayiguraga iwe baramushinja kuba avuga ko hari
ibyo bapfa nta shingiro byahabwa kuko nta bimenyetso abitangira”3.
[20] Urukiko rurasanga ibyakozwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, uretse no kuba rudasobanura impamvu
rwashingiyeho mu guca urubanza (absence de motivation), rwahamije n’ibidahuje na dosiye kuko
n’Ubushinjacyaha butemeza ko hari ikiyobyabwenge Ndayizeye yafatanwe, ahubwo bukaba
bwaraburanye buvuga ko yabonye abapolisi akabijugunya ku buryo bitigeze bigaragara.
[21] Nubwo bitabujijwe ko ushinjwa atanga ubuhamya ku muntu bashinjwa hamwe, nyamara
kandi, ubwo buhamya bugomba kuba busobanutse ku buryo burambuye kandi bugashyigikirwa
n’ibindi bimenyetso bifite ireme. Urukiko rurasanga bidahagije gushingira ku mvugo ya
Nshimiyimana na Ishimwe ivuga ko heroine bafatanwe bayiguze na Ndayizeye, kuko nta kindi
kimenyetso gihuza heroine bafatanwe na Ndayizeye bavuga ko yayibahaye.
1 Henry Bosly et Damien Vandermeersch, Droit de la procédure pénale, 4e édition, p. 1316, 5” Une personne ne peut
être déclarée coupable au terme du procès que si l’accusation a apporté la preuve au-delà de tout doute raisonnable
de la culpabilité de l’accusé”
2 Reba igika cya 18 cy’urubanza RPAA 0001/14/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 17/11/2017 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Dusengimana Ferdinand.
3 Reba igika cya 10 cy’urubanza rujuririrwa

[22] Rurasanga, ubuhamya bwa Hagenimana bushingiye ku kuba hari amakuru yari afite ko
Ndayizeye yaba acuruza ibiyobyabwenge, aya makuru akaba yari kuba impamo iyo koko aza
gufatanwa ibiyobyabwenge nk’uko avuga ko yamuhamagaye ngo abimuzanire, ariko mu kumufata
bakaba barasanze ntabyo afite. Kuba Ubugenzacyaha bwaravuze ko ibiyobyabwenge yabitaye
ndetse babishaka aho abitaye ntibabibone, ubwabyo biburizamo ireme ry’imvugo ya Hagenimana
ko yamuhamagaye amusaba kumuzanira udupfunyika 3 twa heroine, kuko ntacyarwemeza ko
aribyo bavuganye, mu gihe ushinjwa we avuga ko baganiriye ibijyanye na telefoni baguraga.
[23] Urukiko rurasanga, byaba ari ukugenekereza mu guhamya umuntu icyaha hashingiwe ku
kuba atarashoboye kugaragaza icyo apfa n’abamushinja icyaha, kuko ireme ry’ubuhamya rigomba
kugaragarira mu buryo ibivugwa bihuje n’ukuri kw’ibyabaye kandi bikaboneka ko utanga
ubuhamya asobanura neza ibyo yabonye cyangwa yumvise ku buryo butuma umucamanza yemera
nta shiti ko ibivuzwe bigize ikimenyetso gishinja.
[24] Urukiko rurasanga raporo y’ibyabaye igaragaza ko Ndayizeye afatanwe inshinge 2 zo
kwitera ibiyobyabwenge ariko iyi raporo ushinjwa akaba yaranze kuyishyiraho umukono avuga
ko atazifatanwe, nanone hakaba nta kindi kimenyetso gihuza izi nshinge na Ndayizeye uretse
imvugo z’abamufashe.
[25] Urukiko rurasanga, nk’uko byatanzweho umurongo n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga mu manza
zavuzwe haruguru, ushinjwa adashobora guhamwa n’icyaha mu gihe cyose ibimenyetso
by’ubushinjacyaha bigifite icyuho cyo gushidikanya. Ku birebana n’uru rubanza, icyuho kiboneka
mu kuba Nshimiyimana na Ishimwe aribo bafatanwe ibiyobyabwenge, imvugo zabo ko babiguze
na Ndayizeye zikaba zidafite ikindi kizishyigikira ngo zemerwe nk’ukuri. Ikindi nuko, nta
gihamya ko inshinge zivugwa mu nyandiko-mvugo y’ibyabaye, ari iza Ndayizeye mu gihe
yayihakanye rugikubita kandi nta n’undi muntu udafite aho ahuriye n’urubanza wabonye koko
Ndayizeye afatanwa inshinge zivugwa.
[26] Urukiko, rushingiye ku ngingo ya 111 y’Itegeko N° 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019
ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha, igira iti: “Iyo urubanza rwakurikiranywe
mu buryo bwose, ntihagire ibimenyetso nyakuri biboneka byemeza nta shiti abacamanza ko
ushinjwa yakoze icyaha koko, bagomba kwemeza ko atsinze”, rushingiye no kubyasobanuwe mu
bika bibanziriza iki, rurasanga Ndayizeye Patrick akwiye kugirwa umwere ku cyaha cyo kugurisha
ibiyobyabwenge kubwo gushidikanya ku bimenyetso byatanzwe.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[27] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa Ndayizeye Patrick bufite ishingiro;
[28] Rwemeje ko urubanza N° RPA 00768/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru kuwa
12/12/2024, ruhindutse mu ngingo zarwo zose;
[29] Rwemeje ko Ndayizeye Patrick agizwe umwere ku cyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge
ashinjwa;
[30] Rwemeje ko Ndayizeye Patrick ahita arekurwa uru rubanza rukimara gusomwa.
